channel.title: OneDrive on upyesp
channel.description: Recent content in OneDrive on upyesp

item.title: How To Avoid Long OneDrive Folder Names
item.description: If your employer or university provides you with Microsoft OneDrive, it is so useful right? But the long folder name can get in the way, like in the prompt of an IDE, terminal session or when browsing files in Explorer. One simple command, mklink, can fix that.
